title: Srimulat: Hil yang Mustahal - Babak Pertama
original_title: Srimulat: Hil Yang Mustahal – Babak Pertama
overview: Tells the story of the time when the comedy group Srimulat's career began to climb so that it became the first to appear on Indonesian national television.
